name: list_accounts
description: Retrieve the chart of accounts for a business, showing all income, expense, asset, and liability accounts. Useful for understanding the financial structure and for categorizing transactions.

parameters.name: businessId
parameters.description: The ID of the business to list accounts for.

body.query: query($businessId: ID!) { business(id: $businessId) { accounts { edges { node { id name type { name value } subtype { name value } normalBalanceType currency { code } } } } } }
